headline: Howard Lindzon on Seed Investing: Why Most of Your Bets Will Fail: and Why That’s Okay
summary: Howard Lindzon does something most venture capitalists would never do: he tells his limited partners, upfront, that most of his bets will fail. The StockTwits CEO and Social Capital founder describes his seed fund using a metaphor he borrowed from a Larry David sensibility. “You are betting on me to hang 30 pieces of art ... Howard Lindzon on Seed Investing: Why Most of Your Bets Will Fail: and Why That’s Okay

headline: 5 Must-Read Analyst Questions From Coinbase’s Q1 Earnings Call
summary: Coinbase’s first quarter results for 2026 reflected a challenging environment, with revenue and adjusted earnings falling short of Wall Street expectations. Management attributed the underperformance primarily to a significant drop in overall crypto trading volume and lower asset prices, which outpaced growth in newer business lines. CEO Brian Armstrong noted, “We faced headwinds with a softer trading market this quarter, but we executed well on what was in our control,” highlighting continued m
